title: TaxPosition
description: An estimated tax position for an estate in a specific jurisdiction, including gross and net values, available exemptions, and estimated liability
$comment: Reusable tax position summary. Producers calculate the estimated tax liability for a given jurisdiction, accounting for exemptions and lifetime transfers. This is always an estimate — the disclaimer field is required to make that clear.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code or ISO 3166-2 subdivision code identifying the tax jurisdiction

calculatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this tax position was computed

grossEstateValue.description: Total gross value of the estate before deducting liabilities, in minor currency units

netEstateValue.description: Net estate value after deducting liabilities, in minor currency units

lifetimeTransfersInLookback.description: Total value of lifetime transfers (gifts, settlements) made within the lookback period, in minor currency units

lookbackPeriod.description: The lookback period for lifetime transfers in this jurisdiction, expressed as a human-readable duration

availableExemptions.description: Tax exemptions and reliefs that may reduce the taxable estate. Each entry describes one exemption, its value, and whether it has been applied

name.description: The name of the exemption or relief

amount.description: The monetary value of this exemption, in minor currency units

applied.description: Whether this exemption has been applied in the current calculation

notes.description: Additional context about eligibility, conditions, or partial application of this exemption
examples: Tapered due to estate value exceeding £2m
Transferred nil-rate band from predeceased spouse

taxableEstate.description: The estate value subject to tax after applying exemptions, in minor currency units

estimatedLiability.description: The estimated tax due, in minor currency units. This is an estimate and should not be treated as a final liability

effectiveRate.description: The effective tax rate as a percentage of the gross estate value

warnings.description: Data gaps, simplifying assumptions, or other caveats that may affect the accuracy of this estimate
examples: No valuation on file for 2 properties — using purchase price
Lifetime transfers may be incomplete — only gifts over £3,000 recorded

disclaimer.description: A mandatory disclaimer stating that this is an estimate and not professional tax advice
examples: Estimated for planning purposes only. This is not tax advice. Consult a qualified tax advisor.
